keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY HYPOCHONDRIÆ. Hypochondriæ : Aco., Chin., Ran-b. Hypochondriæ, right , liver and gall-ducts, etc. : Aco., Alo., Am-c., Am-m., Ars., Aur., Bar-c., Bell., Berb., Bry., Chel., Chin., Cocc., Colch., Dios., Gels., Hyds., Iris., Kali-c., Lach., Lyc., Mag-m., Merc., Nat-s., Nux-v., Pho., Pod., Rhe., Sep. Hypochondriæ, right, posterior : Calc-c., Kali-bi., Lept., Rhus-t. Hypochondriæ, left , spleen and pancreas : Alu., Arn., Asaf., Carb-v., Chin., Con., Flu-ac., Ign., Iris., Naj., Nat-m., Nat-s., Nit-ac., Ran-b., Sul., Ther. Hypochondriæ, abscess : Lach. Hypochondriæ, around : Ran-b. Hypochondriæ, backward , (to scapula) ; (r) : Aco., Aesc., Bor., Calc-c., Chel., Dios., Grap., Hyds., Kali-bi., Lyc., Mag-m., Nat-m. Hypochondriæ, burning , heat, etc., liver : Alo., Aur., Lach., Lept., Merc., Myrt. Hypochondriæ, coughing , agg. : Dros., Eup-p., Kali-c., Nat-s. Hypochondriæ, cramp , (r) : Merc. Hypochondriæ, gall-bladder , gall-stones, etc. : Berb., Bry., Calc-c., Card-m., Chel., Chin., Euon., Lach., Lept., Lyc., Mag-p., Merc., Nux-v., Pho., Pod., Sang. Hypochondriæ, induration (liver) : Grap. Hypochondriæ, inflammation (liver) : Lach., Mag-m., Pho. Hypochondriæ, inflammation (liver, gall-bladder) : Lach., Pho. Hypochondriæ, liver and right arm : Bry., Iris. Hypochondriæ, liver, with lung symptoms : Card-m., Chel., Hyds. Hypochondriæ, liver, lying on left side, agg. : Arn., Card-m., Mag-m., Nat-s., Ptel. Hypochondriæ, liver, pressure, agg. : Bell., Bry., Carb-v., Card-m., Lach., Lyc., Merc., Pho. Hypochondriæ, liver, scapula, left, to : Dios., Dulc., Lept., Myrt. Hypochondriæ, liver, urticaria, with : Canc-fl., Myrt. Hypochondriæ, pain , liver : Bry. Hypochondriæ, pressure (liver) : Mag-m. Hypochondriæ, sticking : Ign., Sil. Hypochondriæ, sticking, spleen : Ign. Hypochondriæ, tension : Aco., Lyc. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
